ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "watts" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage level at the time of measurement */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps at the time of measurement */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor indicating efficiency */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Identifier or tag for the measurement session */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for data grouping */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the data pertains to */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the data was collected */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., industrial machine, HVAC, lighting) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., reliable, questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the session was conducted */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., industrial machine, HVAC, lighting) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the equipment is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "operating_status" TEXT /* Current operating status of the equipment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the equipment is installed */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report pertains to */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the report pertains to */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is confidential */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high consumption, low power factor) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the alert pertains to */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the alert pertains to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitored equipment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "total_watts" REAL /* Total watts consumed for the day */,
  "average_volts" REAL /* Average voltage level for the day */,
  "average_amps" REAL /* Average current level for the day */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the data pertains to */,
  "total_volts" REAL /* Total voltage for the day */,
  "total_amps" REAL /* Total current for the day */,
  "average_power_factor" REAL /* Average power factor for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the maintenance was performed */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the maintenance is completed */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is the current session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
